modmenu.descriptionTranslation.guardvill: Adds guard villagers that patrol, fight raiders, and protect the village. Configure spawning, combat, reputation gates, and villager AI from Mod Menu.
guardvillagers.midnightconfig.title: Guard Villagers
guardvillagers.midnightconfig.guardsIntr: Patrol behavior, healing, equipment drops, and guard appearance.
guardvillagers.midnightconfig.combatIntr: Targeting rules, shields, ally help range, and projectile damage.
guardvillagers.midnightconfig.interactio: Village reputation and Hero of the Village requirements for player actions.
guardvillagers.midnightconfig.villageInt: Raid behavior and villager AI tweaks around your settlement.
guardvillagers.midnightconfig.spawningIn: Natural guard spawning when villagers are first processed on chunk load.
guardvillagers.midnightconfig.statsIntro: Base attributes for newly spawned guards. Does not change guards already in the world.
guardvillagers.midnightconfig.guardEntit: Guards can open doors and path through them while patrolling.
Guards can open doors and path through them while patrolling.
Shield-bearing guards group up and hold formation during fights.
Shield-bearing guards group up and hold formation during fights.
Guards run from polar bears instead of engaging them.
Guards run from polar bears instead of engaging them.
guardvillagers.midnightconfig.followHero: Guards can follow a player with the Hero of the Village effect.
Guards can follow a player with the Hero of the Village effect.
guardvillagers.midnightconfig.clericHeal: Injured guards path to clerics for healing.
Injured guards path to clerics for healing.
guardvillagers.midnightconfig.armorerRep: Guards visit armorers to repair damaged armor.
Guards visit armorers to repair damaged armor.
guardvillagers.midnightconfig.amountOfHe: Health restored every few seconds while a guard is injured.
Health restored every few seconds while a guard is injured.
guardvillagers.midnightconfig.chanceToDr: Chance on death from 0 to 1. 1 always drops unless prevent-drop enchantments apply. Existing configs using 100 still behave as always drop.
Chance on death from 0 to 1. 1 always drops unless prevent-drop enchantments apply. Existing configs using 100 still behave as always drop.
guardvillagers.midnightconfig.useSteveMo: Render guards with the classic player model instead of the villager-style guard model.
Render guards with the classic player model instead of the villager-style guard model.
guardvillagers.midnightconfig.guardAlway: Keep shields raised whenever possible, not only when enemies are nearby.
Keep shields raised whenever possible, not only when enemies are nearby.
guardvillagers.midnightconfig.friendlyFi: Crossbow guards step aside when villagers, golems, or other guards are in their line of fire.
Crossbow guards step aside when villagers, golems, or other guards are in their line of fire.
guardvillagers.midnightconfig.guardArrow: When off, guard arrows and crossbow bolts do not damage villagers or iron golems.
When off, guard arrows and crossbow bolts do not damage villagers or iron golems.
guardvillagers.midnightconfig.attackAllM: Target any hostile mob, not only raiders, witches, ravagers, and zombies.
Target any hostile mob, not only raiders, witches, ravagers, and zombies.
guardvillagers.midnightconfig.mobBlackLi: Entity IDs guards never attack, such as minecraft:creeper. Most useful when Attack All Hostile Mobs is enabled.
Entity IDs guards never attack, such as minecraft:creeper. Most useful when Attack All Hostile Mobs is enabled.
guardvillagers.midnightconfig.guardVilla: How far in blocks allies search when joining a fight.
How far in blocks allies search when joining a fight.
guardvillagers.midnightconfig.reputation: Minimum village reputation to open a guard inventory or trade items, unless Hero overrides apply.
Minimum village reputation to open a guard inventory or trade items, unless Hero overrides apply.
At this reputation or lower, guards may attack you.
At this reputation or lower, guards may attack you.
guardvillagers.midnightconfig.giveGuardS: Require Hero of the Village to give items to guards. Reputation still applies when off.
Require Hero of the Village to give items to guards. Reputation still applies when off.
guardvillagers.midnightconfig.setGuardPa: Require Hero of the Village to set a guard patrol point.
Require Hero of the Village to set a guard patrol point.
guardvillagers.midnightconfig.convertVil: Require Hero of the Village to convert a villager with a sword or crossbow.
Require Hero of the Village to convert a villager with a sword or crossbow.
guardvillagers.midnightconfig.raidAnimal: During raids, raiders also target nearby animals.
During raids, raiders also target nearby animals.
guardvillagers.midnightconfig.witchesVil: Witches actively target villagers and related village NPCs.
Witches actively target villagers and related village NPCs.
guardvillagers.midnightconfig.blackSmith: Toolsmiths and weaponsmiths can repair injured iron golems.
Toolsmiths and weaponsmiths can repair injured iron golems.
guardvillagers.midnightconfig.spawnChanc: One-time roll from 0 to 1 when a natural villager is first processed. Use 0 for minimum-fill only.
One-time roll from 0 to 1 when a natural villager is first processed. Use 0 for minimum-fill only.
guardvillagers.midnightconfig.minimumGua: After the chance roll, fill sparse clusters up to this many guards.
After the chance roll, fill sparse clusters up to this many guards.
guardvillagers.midnightconfig.villageGua: Block radius for counting nearby guards and villagers when spawning.
Block radius for counting nearby guards and villagers when spawning.
guardvillagers.midnightconfig.healthModi: Base maximum health for newly spawned guards.
Base maximum health for newly spawned guards.
guardvillagers.midnightconfig.followRang: How far guards can detect and pursue targets.
How far guards can detect and pursue targets.
